{{Quote|Trawler prepared to sail.|An Imperial Trawler captain|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
'''Utility trawlers''' were unarmed aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] designed and utilized for [[Fishing/Legends|fishing]] and aquaculture harvesting, and generally had one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. They were equipped with powerful loading arms for deploying and retrieving fishing nets and were capable of hauling immense loads of [[Fish/Legends|fish]], algae, kelp, or krill in their open hulls. Though simple and utilitarian in appearance, they varied widely from culture to culture, from the boxy design favored by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to the smooth [[Color/Legends|yellow]] curves of the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="SW:GB" /><ref name="CC" />

The [[222 fishing trawler]] was an example of a common utility trawler, and many were acquired for use at the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bartyn's Landing]]. The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], Naboo, [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] all had their own versions of the utility trawler in the waning years of the Republic, as did the Rebel Alliance and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SW:GB" /><ref name="CC" /><ref name="Reckonings" />

==Behind the scenes==
222 fishing trawlers were first mentioned in ''[[Reckonings]]'', in an article in the [[2001]] magazine [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]]. Utility trawlers in general first appeared in the 2001 [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and later in its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They were built at shipyards for 75 units of food and 10 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].<gallery>
TradeFederationTrawler.jpg| A Trade Federation utility trawler.
ImperialTrawler.jpg| An Imperial utility trawler.
</gallery>
